roa.docketEntryComment: Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance
Advisement and Waiver - DUI Advisement of Rights, Waiver, and Plea Form (Wet Reckless or Dry Reckless)
THE COURT ORDERS A GENERAL ORDER OF RESTITUTION AS TO THE NAMED VICTIMSAND THE COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION OVER RESTITUTION IN THIS MATTER
DEFT MOTION TO SUPPRESS PURS PC1538,5 - FILED AT INSISTENCE

/CAL SENTENCE/TWS/CH6 ISS CPROB PROB 18 M PJ 1 D/CTS 1/PF145 18/VF2 150/FOP1:12 HR/LCHEM/LVAL/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CITE/EMAT/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 100 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SETFORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/4019HALF/CONTD APD MISD REST REPORT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT'SRESTITUTION UNIT FOR DETERMINATION OF MISDEMEANOR VICTIM RESTITUTION,/RESTRPT:04-08-20/CONTD:MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTION REPORT FROM ADULT PROBATION INDEPARTMENT 30/DOPU:ATTORNEY APPEARANCE/

/CAL:CHANGE OF PLEA/X: THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TOADD COUNT #6, VC 23103 WITHIN THE MEANING OF VC 23103,5, A MISDEMEANOR, ISGRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/  /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:6/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/X:COURT GRANTS THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S ORALMOTION FOR A CONTINUANCE BEYOND 10TH DAY OF 01-24-20 DUE TO WITNESS UNAVAILABILITY,/X:COURT NOTES THE 60TH DAY IN THIS CASE IS 03-09-20,/CONTD:D11 TO SET/DOP/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:01-24-20/987,2/TE:3 HOURS/CONTD:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL TO SET/X THE CAUSE IS ORDERED TRANSFERRED FORTHWITH TO DEPARTMENT 29BEFORE VISITING JUDGE HARRY JACOBS FOR DISPOSITION,/
